product_overview: BioPara is a commerce-focused platform with a web storefront for browsing and purchasing products. The available web app lets users discover products, inspect details, manage a shopping cart, and complete checkout after signing in.
core_goals: Browse the product catalog and discover items by category or search
View detailed information for individual products
Add products to the shopping cart and update quantities
Complete purchase checkout after signing in

features.name: Product Browsing
features.description: Users can explore the storefront, search for products, and filter the catalog by category to find items of interest.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> View product list -> Type in search box -> See filtered results
Navigate to /products -> Click on product category -> View product list with matching items
Navigate to / -> View best sellers and categories -> Continue to product listing

features.name: Product Details
features.description: Users can open an individual product page to review item-specific information before deciding to buy.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Select a product from the list -> View product details
Navigate to / -> Select a featured product -> View product details

features.name: Shopping Cart Management
features.description: Users can add products to their cart and adjust the items they intend to purchase.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Select a product -> Add to cart -> Open cart page -> See added item
Navigate to /cart -> View cart contents -> Change item quantities -> See updated cart contents
Navigate to /products -> Select a product -> Add to cart -> Open cart page -> Remove or reduce items -> See updated cart contents

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Signed-in users can proceed from the cart to checkout and complete the purchase flow through Stripe.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> Proceed to checkout -> Sign in -> Review checkout details -> Complete payment flow
Navigate to /checkout -> See sign-in requirement -> Sign in -> Continue to checkout -> Complete payment flow

routes.description: Home page with best sellers and categories

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Add products to cart and manage cart items
user_interactions: Click "Add to Cart" button on product
